name: Wooden ABC Puzzle - 27pc - Gigglescape™: Educational Focus on Shapes, Colors, Problem Solving, Wood Material
description:
This Wooden ABC Puzzle from Gigglescape™ is a great tool for your child to learn the letters of the alphabet while developing their fine-motor skills and problem-solving abilities. This set includes a wooden board and 26 letter pieces with rounded corners. Plus, each letter is designed in a vibrant color with a cute painted face to make learning fun.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
